svg.title: Mediator pattern — sequence / event flow diagram
svg.desc: UML sequence diagram showing ComponentA triggering doA, calling notify on ConcreteMediator, which routes reactToB and reactToC to ComponentB and ComponentC. Components never talk to each other directly.
svg.text: A never calls B or C — only the mediator can route
Solid arrow = synchronous call Dashed filled = event/notification Dashed open = return
Components only hold a reference to IMediator — never to each other
